reason_for_decision: The article passes because it shows how placement geometry, clutter, calibration, and sector ownership change RF performance before algorithms can help.
strengths: The article is strong on explaining why antenna placement is part of the RF measurement chain rather than a final installation detail.
It adds practical deployment judgment through sector-based planning, post-installation validation, and maintenance-change awareness.
The bearing discussion stays concrete by tying array integrity and calibration to real-site consequences.
summary_assessment: This is a strong RF deployment article. It is technically believable, decision-useful, and gives readers a credible framework for antenna siting and validation.
